# Research - 2026-07-01

Focus: **all** (CLI, providers, tools, MCP, commands, hooks, skills, plugins)

> 1-day delta. Wednesday -> weekly repos (claude-code, aider)
> skipped. Prior #1 (MCP `content` over `structuredContent`) and
> #3 (`taskId` on subagent failure paths) LANDED in `src/`
> (`src/mcp/client.ts:513-536`, `src/tool/tools/task.ts:198-215`).
> Prior #2 (AbortSignal in non-streaming `sendChat`) still OPEN at
> `orchestrator.ts:78` -- ship first. Three NEW items today: an
> Anthropic reasoning-effort gap that affects our own pinned
> `AGENT_MODEL` (opus 4.7), a `--yolo` mode that would wire our
> dormant `AllowEverythingPermission` module, and a small guard
> keeping internal agent metadata out of provider requests.

## Executive Summary

- **#1 opencode #34673 (~2h)**: `modelSupportsReasoningEffort`
  (`model-match.ts:107-114`) returns `'none'` for every Anthropic
  id -- including our pinned `anthropic--claude-4.7-opus`. Opus 4.7
  and Sonnet 5+ accept adaptive levels; currently we drop the field.
- **#2 opencode #33279 (~3h)**: `AllowEverythingPermission` exists
  (`src/permission/allow-everything.ts`) but has zero call sites.
  Add `--yolo` / `--dangerously-skip-permissions` to `chat`, `agent`,
  `interactive` and plumb `permissionMode: 'auto' | 'normal'` through
  `evaluate.ts`.
- **#3 kilocode #11767 + `275af49` (~1h)**: preventive sanitizer
  that strips internal fields (`displayName`, `source`, `reference`,
  `resolved`, `id`) from `agent.options` before any future provider
  forwarding. No leak today, but the schema is one commit away.
- **Rotation**: aider 40 days dry, claude-code 10 cycles dry.
  Yesterday's brief already proposed monthly demotion -- carry
  forward and land in `agent1-research-system.md` this week.

## Detailed Findings

#### 1. Anthropic adaptive reasoning-effort levels (provider, ~2h)

- **What**: In `model-match.ts:107`, add Anthropic branches BEFORE
  the `return 'none'`. Regexes mirror opencode:
  `opus-(\d+)|claude-(\d+)-opus` gated on `major > 4 || (major===4
  && minor>=7)`; `sonnet-(\d+)|claude-(\d+)-sonnet` gated on
  `major >= 5`. Both return `'levels'`. `supportsReasoning` (`:64`)
  already returns true for the claude family -- verify only. Tests:
  `sap-ai-core/anthropic--claude-4.7-opus` -> `'levels'`;
  `anthropic--claude-5-sonnet` -> `'levels'`;
  `claude-3.5-sonnet` -> `'none'` (unchanged).
- **Why**: Our default agent model IS opus 4.7. CLI/router options
  pass `reasoningEffort` today; every Claude id silently drops it.
  Dispatch is already wired for DeepSeek (`deepseek.ts:49-56`) --
  extending one function + tests is a clean win.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#34673 (`3a669d5`, 2026-06-30, `+85 -2`,
  `packages/opencode/src/provider/transform.ts` --
  `anthropicSonnet5OrLater` reuses `anthropicAdaptiveEfforts`).
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~2h).

#### 2. `--yolo` permission mode wiring (command, ~3h)

- **What**: Three pieces. (a) Add `.option('--yolo', ...)` with
  hidden alias `--dangerously-skip-permissions` to
  `commands/chat.ts:86`, `agent.ts:59`, `interactive.ts:38`.
  (b) Thread `permissionMode: 'auto' | 'normal'` into
  `PermissionContext` (`permission/index.ts`) and short-circuit
  `evaluate.ts` when `'auto'` by delegating to
  `createAllowEverythingPermission({ enabled: true })` -- exclude
  patterns still deny `.env`, `~/.ssh`. (c) TUI: add `PermissionMode`
  badge in `StatusBar.tsx` + `Ctrl+Y` toggle (mirrors opencode's
  `context/permission.tsx`). Tests: `--yolo` sets mode; every tool
  auto-approves; excludePatterns still deny.
- **Why**: The module is production-ready and tested but unused
  (`grep -r AllowEverything src` returns one file). Non-interactive
  agent runs cannot advance past a permission prompt today, forcing
  `KILO_FLAGS=--auto --variant max` at the harness layer as a
  workaround. Move it to the app layer where it belongs.
- **Source**: sst/opencode#33279 (`0a5bed2`, 2026-06-30, `+133 -36`,
  files: `packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/run.ts`,
  `packages/tui/src/context/permission.tsx`).
- **Category**: command. **Size**: small (~3h).

#### 3. Sanitize `agent.options` before provider forwarding (provider, ~1h)

- **What**: `agent/index.ts:35` types `options` as
  `Record<string, unknown>`; the loader stores `displayName`,
  `source`, `reference`, `resolved` there (`:19-20`,
  `customAgentLoader.ts:115`). Add `sanitizeAgentOptions(agent)` in
  `providers/transform.ts` that strips a fixed deny-list
  (`displayName`, `source`, `id`, `reference`, `resolved`) and
  returns `Record<string, unknown>`. Export from `providers/index.ts`
  so future call sites (streaming orchestrator, batch tool) call it
  as a guard. Tests: deny-listed keys removed; unknown keys pass;
  empty options returns `{}`.
- **Why**: Preventive. Kilocode shipped this fix twice in 8 days
  (#11767 for the initial four keys, `275af49` same day to add
  `reference`/`resolved` after Scout agents regressed on strict
  providers like NVIDIA NIM and MiniMax M3). Landing the guard now
  costs 1h; discovering it after the first 400 is an afternoon.
- **Source**: Kilo-Org/kilocode#11767 (`ac987f5`, 2026-06-30, `+96 -1`)
  + `275af49` (2026-06-29, `+3 -1`,
  `packages/opencode/src/kilocode/agent/options.ts`).
- **Category**: provider. **Size**: small (~1h).

## Actionable Recommendations

1. **Order**: prior #2 (AbortSignal, still open, ~2h) FIRST, then
   #1 here (~2h, unblocks our own opus 4.7 reasoning), #2 here (~3h,
   retires the `--auto` harness workaround), #3 (~1h, preventive).
2. **Demote aider + claude-code to monthly**: 40 days / 10 cycles
   dry. Retag `<!-- monthly (1st Mon) -->` in
   `agent1-research-system.md` and drop from Wednesday runs.
3. **Defer**: opencode #34686 (github-copilot only), #34645
   (opencode `config.json` -- we don't ship it), #34702
   (`forceReasoning` for `@ai-sdk/openai` -- we use SAP AI Core
   directly), cline #11984 (hub-backed sessions -- ours is file-
   backed), kilocode #11838 (sandbox+worktree fork -- no sandbox).
